10243040.d: Evenly matches the percentage of the HP of all allies and removes all harmful effects. After that, increases the Defense of all allies for 3 turns.

10244000.d: Revives with 50% HP when you're inflicted with fatal damage, and resets the skill cooldown time of all skills and falls under the Magic Power Explosion state for 2 turns. You'll be uncontrollable under the Magic Power Explosion state and be defeated when the effect ends. [Automatic Effect]

10251000.d: Uses Mana to attack the enemy and inflict damage.

10251010.d: Attacks the enemy to absorb 10% of the target's Attack Bar with a 25% chance.

10251011.d: Attacks the enemy to remove 1 beneficial effect granted on the target and absorbs 10% of the target's Attack Bar with a 25% chance each.

10251012.d: Attacks the enemy 3 times to absorb 10% of the target's Attack Bar with a 25% chance each.

10252010.d: Attacks the enemy to remove all beneficial effects granted on the target with a 75% chance.

10252011.d: Attacks the enemy to remove all beneficial effects granted on the target with a 75% chance and weakens the Defense for 2 turns with a 50% chance.

10252012.d: Attacks the enemy to remove all beneficial effects granted on the target with a 75% chance and stuns the target for 1 turn if you successfully remove the beneficial effects.

10252020.d: Attacks the enemy to elongate the harmful effect granted on the enemy by 1 turn with a 25% chance.

10252021.d: Attacks the enemy 3 times to elongate the harmful effect granted on the enemy by 1 turn with a 25% chance each.

10252022.d: Attacks the enemy to elongate the harmful effect granted on the enemy by 1 turn with a 25% chance. After that, the enemy's HP will be decreased proportionate to the total no. of turns of the harmful effect granted on the target.

10253000.d: Creates a shield that absorbs damage proportionate to your level on all allies and increases their Defense for 2 turns.

10253010.d: Increases the skill cooldown time of all enemies by 2 turns each and decreases the Attack Speed for 2 turns. After that, the skill cooldown time of all allies will be decreased by 2 turns each and the Attack Speed will be increased for 2 turns.

10253020.d: Puts the enemy target to sleep for 3 turns and decreases the Attack Speed of all other enemies for 2 turns. The sleep effect can't be resisted.

10253030.d: Removes all beneficial effects on all enemies, decreases their Attack Speed for 2 turns with a 30% chance and Stuns them for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

10253040.d: Attacks the enemy 4 times to grant a harmful effect that isn't granted on the enemy for 2 turns each among Decrease ATK SPD/Increased chances of landing a Glancing Hit/Decrease DEF/Decrease ATK/Branding/Unrecoverable Effects.

10254000.d: Revives with 50% HP when you're inflicted with fatal damage, and resets the skill cooldown time of all skills and falls under the Magic Power Explosion state for 2 turns. You'll be uncontrollable under the Magic Power Explosion state and be defeated when the effect ends. [Automatic Effect]

20010112.d: Smites the enemy, removing 1 beneficial effect and decreasing its Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns. In addition, deals additional damage by the shield amount of the boss.

20010121.d: Smites the enemy, removing 1 beneficial effect and decreasing Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns.

20010122.d: Smites the enemy, inflicting Continuous Damage for 2 turns and decreasing its Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns.

20010131.d: Smites the enemy, removing 1 beneficial effect and decreasing Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns.

20010132.d: Smites the enemy, removing all beneficial effects and decreasing its Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns. In addition, increases the damage dealt by 200% if the target is already stunned.

20010141.d: Smites the enemy, removing 1 beneficial effect and decreasing Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns.

20010142.d: Smites the enemy, removing all beneficial effects and decreasing its Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns.

20010151.d: Smites the enemy, removing 1 beneficial effect and decreasing Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns.

20010161.d: Smites the enemy, removing 1 beneficial effect and decreasing Attack Speed and Attack Power for 3 turns.

20010211.d: Strikes all enemies, decreasing their Defense for 3 turns.

20010221.d: Strikes all enemies, decreasing their Defense for 3 turns. The worse the enemy's HP condition, the more Defense it ignores (up to 100%).

20010222.d: Attacks all enemies to decrease their Defense for 3 turns and inflict Continuous Damage for 2 turns.

20010231.d: Strikes all enemies, decreasing their Defense for 3 turns.

20010232.d: Attacks all enemies to absorb their Attack Bar by 50% and decrease their defense for 3 turns. Guarantees to stun the target if their Attack Bar is depleted.

20010241.d: Strikes all enemies, decreasing their Defense for 3 turns.

20010242.d: Attacks all enemies to decrease their Defense for 3 turns. Increases the damage dealt to enemies with no beneficial effects by 100%.

20010251.d: Strikes all enemies, decreasing their Defense for 3 turns.

20010261.d: Strikes all enemies, decreasing their Defense for 3 turns.

20010311.d: Whenever attacked, deals damage to the attacker with burning flames and recovers the Boss's HP in proportion to the damage dealt. The greater the difference in Defense, the more damage the Boss deals. [Automatic Effect]

20010312.d: Whenever attacked, deals damage to the attacker with burning flames, recovers HP in proportion to the damage dealt, and creates a shield equal to the recovery amount. [Automatic Effect]

20010321.d: Whenever attacked, deals damage to the attacker and recovers the Boss's HP in proportion to the damage dealt. [Automatic Effect]

20010322.d: Whenever attacked, deals damage to the attacker with burning flames and recovers HP in proportion to the damage dealt. In addition, when an ally is attacked by an enemy with 2 or more Continuous Damage, explodes the Continuous Damage to deal corresponding damage. [Automatic Effect]

In addition, increases the Attack Power by 20%, up to 200%, when the Boss gets attacked by the enemy with a Glancing Hit. Resets when the next turn ends. [Automatic Effect]

20010351.d: Whenever attacked, deals damage to the attacker with burning flames and recovers the Boss's HP in proportion to the damage dealt. Increases the Attack Power by 10%, up to 100%, whenever the Boss recovers HP. Resets when the next turn ends. [Automatic Effect]

20010352.d: Whenever attacked, deals damage to the attacker with burning flames and recovers HP in proportion to the damage dealt. Increases the Attack Bar by 50% whenever receiving a non-Critical Hit attack. [Automatic Effect]

20010361.d: Whenever attacked, deals damage to the attacker with burning flames and recovers the Boss's HP in proportion to the damage dealt. [Automatic Effect]

20020131.d: Attacks the enemy with a strong mental force and removes all beneficial effects.

20020132.d: Attacks the enemy with a strong mental force and removes a beneficial effect. Increases the provoke duration by 1 turn if the Boss attacks a provoked enemy.

20020142.d: Attacks the enemy with a strong mental force and removes all beneficial effects.

20020161.d: Attacks the enemy with a strong mental force and removes all beneficial effects.

20020242.d: Manifests a horrible delusion and attacks all enemies and decreases the Defense for 3 turns. Absorbs the Attack Bar by 100% of the target that got its Defense decreased. Damage increases according to the number of merges.

20020251.d: Manifests a horrible delusion and attacks all enemies and decreases the Defense for 3 turns. Increases the stun duration by 1 turn if the Boss attacks a stunned enemy. Damage increases according to the number of merges.

20020252.d: Manifests a horrible delusion and attacks all enemies and decreases the Defense for 3 turns. Damage increases according to the number of merges.

20020261.d: Manifests a horrible delusion and attacks all enemies and decreases the Defense for 3 turns. Damage increases according to the number of merges.

20020321.d: Summons 2 of the 3 incarnations within and removes all harmful effects. Each incarnation will have its own skill and characteristics, and will merge with Lyrith after 5 turns.

20020331.d: Summons 2 of the 3 incarnations within and removes all harmful effects. Each incarnation will have its own skill and characteristics, and will merge with Lyrith after 5 turns.

20020341.d: Summons 2 of the 3 incarnations within and removes all harmful effects. Each incarnation will have its own skill and characteristics, and will merge with Lyrith after 5 turns.

20020351.d: Summons 2 of the 3 incarnations within and removes all harmful effects. Each incarnation will have its own skill and characteristics, and will merge with Lyrith after 5 turns.

20020361.d: Summons 2 of the 3 incarnations within and removes all harmful effects. Each incarnation will have its own skill and characteristics, and will merge with Lyrith after 5 turns.

20021101.d: Attacks all enemies to decrease their Defense for 2 turns.

20021102.d: Attacks all enemies 5 times. Each hit steals 1 beneficial effect with a 30% chance.

20021103.d: Increases the boss's Defense for 2 turns at the start of its turn and gains immunity against Attack Bar decreasing effects. [Automatic Effect]

20021104.d: At the start of its turn, creates a shield equal to 5% of the boss's MAX HP for 2 turns for each beneficial effect granted on the boss. [Automatic Effect]

20021201.d: Attacks the enemy 4 times. Each of the first 3 hits removes 1 beneficial effect, and the last hit stuns for 1 turn with a 30% chance.

20021202.d: Attacks all enemies 2 times. The first hit decreases their Attack Speed for 2 turns, and the second hit stuns for 1 turn.

20021203.d: Increases the boss's Attack Power for 2 turns at the start of its turn and gains immunity against Attack Bar decreasing effects. [Automatic Effect]

20021204.d: Counterattacks the enemy with a 30% chance when attacked by an enemy with no beneficial effects. [Automatic Effect]

20021301.d: Attacks all enemies. The damage dealt increases by 20% for each harmful effect granted on the target.

20021302.d: Attacks all enemies 6 times. Each of the first 5 hits replaces 1 beneficial effect granted on them with Continuous Damage for 2 turns with a 20% chance.

20021303.d: Increases the boss's Attack Power and Defense for 2 turns at the start of its turn and gains immunity against Attack Bar decreasing effects. [Automatic Effect]

20021304.d: When the boss is attacked, inflicts Continuous Damage for 2 turns to the enemy that attacked the boss. [Automatic Effect]

20021401.d: Attacks all enemies and grants a different harmful effect on each use. On the first use, leaves a Branding effect for 2 turns. On the second use, decreases the Attack Bar by 30%. From the third use onward, stuns the target for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

20021402.d: Increases the boss's Attack Bar by 35% each time an enemy's turn ends. [Automatic Effect]

20021403.d: Recovers 10% of the boss's HP and reduces the duration of harmful effects on the boss by 1 turn at the start of its turn. [Automatic Effect]

20021501.d: Attacks all enemies 4 times to inflict Continuous Damage for 2 turns on each hit and destroy the enemy's MAX HP by 30% of the damage dealt.

20021502.d: Attacks the enemy with the most destroyed HP and deals damage that ignores Defense in proportion to the target’s destroyed HP.

20021503.d: Decreases the Critical Damage received by 50%. If the damage taken from an enemy is 10% or less than the boss's MAX HP, the chance of being granted with any effects from the enemy is decreased by 70%. [Automatic Effect]

20021504.d: At the start of its turn, all other allies team up to attack the enemy with the most destroyed HP. [Automatic Effect]

20021601.d: Attacks all enemies 4 times. The first 3 hits leave a Branding effect for 2 turns with a 70% chance, and the final hit stuns the targets for 1 turn with a 50% chance.

20021602.d: Attacks the enemy and grants the Curse of Death on the enemy target, that cannot be removed, to inflict damage by 25% of the target's MAX HP and disturb HP recovery for 4 turns. The enemy defeated by this effect cannot be revived during battle, and this effect cannot be applied to more than one enemy at the same time.

20021603.d: Decreases the chance of being hit with a Critical Hit by 50%, and creates [Veil of Dread] at the start of its turn. While [Veil of Dread] is active, the boss is immune to all effects from the enemy and the HP cannot drop below 1. In addition, enemies cannot be granted beneficial effects. [Veil of Dread] is removed when the boss is attacked, and the number of hits required to remove it increases based on the number of allies alive. [Automatic Effect]
